debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p < 2 ^ 254)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2 ^ 253)
c : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (offset : ℕ) (env : Environment (F p)) (input_var : Var (fields 254) (F p)) (input : fields 254 (F p)),
    Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input →
      (∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1) →
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
              Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                  else
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
            env.get (offset + 127) =
                Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
              (Num2Bits.circuit 135 (Circomlib.CompConstant.main._proof_5 p inst✝)).Spec (env.get (offset + 127))
                  (Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                    (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))) ∧
                env.get
                    (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
                  Expression.eval env
                    (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))[127] →
          env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
            if fromBits (Vector.map ZMod.val input) > c then 1 else 0

failed_attempts:
intro offset env input_var input h_input ⟨h_bits, hc⟩ ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    simp only [Num2Bits.circuit] at h_num2bits h_out
    obtain ⟨h_sout_lt, h_fieldToBits⟩ := h_num2bits
    -- Simplify ElaboratedCircuit.localLength in goal
    simp only [circuit_norm, Num2Bits.circuit] at h_out ⊢
    -- h_out: env.get (offset + 263) = env.get (offset + 255)
    -- h_fieldToBits: bits vector = fieldToBits 135 sout
    -- Goal: env.get (offset + 263) = if fromBits ... > c then 1 else 0

    -- Step 1: output = (fieldToBits 135 sout)[127]
    have h_bit127 : env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127) = (fieldToBits 135 (env.get (offset + 127)))[127] := by
      have := congr_arg (fun v => v[127]) h_fieldToBits
      simp only [Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange, circuit_norm] at this
      exact this
    rw [h_out, h_bit127]

    -- Step 2: (fieldToBits 135 sout)[127] = if sout.val.testBit 127 then 1 else 0
    simp only [fieldToBits, toBits, Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange]
    simp only [Nat.cast_ite, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero]

    -- Step 3: Show sout.val.testBit 127 = decide(fromBits > c)
    -- Need: env.get(offset+127).val = partsNatSum
    -- From h_parts and h_sout, env.get(offset+127) = sum of field parts
    -- Each field part = ↑(partNatVal ...) by partFieldVal_eq_natCast
    -- Total sum as nat < 2^135 < p, so val = nat sum
    -- Then apply partNatVal_sum_testBit127
    -- Goal: (sout.val.testBit 127 = true) = (fromBits > c)
    -- We need to show sout.val = Fin.foldl 127 (fun acc i => acc + partNatVal c (input.map ZMod.val) i) 0
    -- Then apply partNatVal_sum_testBit127
    have h_input_bits : ∀ i (_ : i < 254), (input.map ZMod.val)[i] = 0 ∨ (input.map ZMod.val)[i] = 1 := by
      intro i hi; simp only [Vector.getElem_map]
      rcases h_bits i hi with h | h
      · left; exact congrArg ZMod.val h ▸ ZMod.val_zero
      · right; exact congrArg ZMod.val h ▸ ZMod.val_one p
    have h_sum_val : (env.get (offset + 127)).val =
        Fin.foldl 127 (fun acc i => acc + partNatVal c (input.map ZMod.val) i) 0 := by
      sorry
    have key := partNatVal_sum_testBit127 c hc (input.map ZMod.val) h_input_bits
    rw [← h_sum_val] at key
    -- key : testBit 127 = decide(fromBits > c)
    -- Goal: (if testBit 127 = true then 1 else 0) = (if fromBits > c then 1 else 0)
    by_cases h_gt : fromBits (Vector.map ZMod.val input) > c
    · have : (ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127))).testBit 127 = true := by
        rw [key]; simp [h_gt]
      simp [this, h_gt]
    · have : (ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127))).testBit 127 ≠ true := by
        rw [key]; simp [h_gt]
      simp [this, h_gt]
